pin_definitions.description: Enable pin for channel 1. Turns the regulator on and off.
Enable pin for channel 2. Turns the regulator on and off.
Feedback pin for channel 1. Input to the control loop error amplifier.
Feedback pin for channel 2. Input to the control loop error amplifier.
Device GND. Connect both pins to the device thermal pad.
Input pin for LDO1. A 10 µF or greater input capacitor is required.
Input pin for LDO2. A 10 µF or greater input capacitor is required.
Noise reduction pin for channel 1. Connect to an external capacitor to bypass noise.
Noise reduction pin for channel 2. Connect to an external capacitor to bypass noise.
Regulated output 1. A 10 µF or greater capacitor must be connected to GND.
Regulated output 2. A 10 µF or greater capacitor must be connected to GND.
Open-drain power-good indicator pin for LDO1 output voltage.
Open-drain power-good indicator pin for LDO2 output voltage.
Soft-start control pin for channel 1. Connect to GND or INx for charging current selection.
Soft-start control pin for channel 2. Connect to GND or INx for charging current selection.
Connect the thermal pad to the printed circuit board (PCB) ground plane.

logical_pins.name: IN1
logical_pins.description: Input pin for LDO1. A 10 μF or greater input capacitor is required to assure robust operation.

logical_pins.name: IN2
logical_pins.description: Input pin for LDO2. A 10 μF or greater input capacitor is required to assure robust operation.

logical_pins.name: GND
logical_pins.description: Device GND. Connect both pins to the device thermal pad.

logical_pins.name: OUT1
logical_pins.description: Regulated output 1. A 10 μF or greater capacitor must be connected from this pin to GND to assure stability.

logical_pins.name: OUT2
logical_pins.description: Regulated output 2. A 10 μF or greater capacitor must be connected from this pin to GND to assure stability.

logical_pins.name: EN1
logical_pins.description: Enable pin for channel 1. These pins turn the regulator on and off. The ENx pin must be connected to INx if the enable function is not used.

logical_pins.name: EN2
logical_pins.description: Enable pin for channel 2. These pins turn the regulator on and off. The ENx pin must be connected to INx if the enable function is not used.

logical_pins.name: FB1
logical_pins.description: Feedback pin for channel 1. These pins are the inputs to the control loop error amplifier and are used to set the output voltage of the device.

logical_pins.name: FB2
logical_pins.description: Feedback pin for channel 2. These pins are the inputs to the control loop error amplifier and are used to set the output voltage of the device.

logical_pins.name: NR/SS1
logical_pins.description: Noise reduction pin for channel 1. Connect these pins to an external capacitor to bypass the noise generated by the internal band-gap reference.

logical_pins.name: NR/SS2
logical_pins.description: Noise reduction pin for channel 2. Connect these pins to an external capacitor to bypass the noise generated by the internal band-gap reference.

logical_pins.name: PG1
logical_pins.description: Open-drain power-good indicator pin for the LDO1 output voltage. These pins can be left floating or connected to GND if not used.

logical_pins.name: PG2
logical_pins.description: Open-drain power-good indicator pin for the LDO2 output voltage. These pins can be left floating or connected to GND if not used.

logical_pins.name: SS_CTRL1
logical_pins.description: Soft-start control pin for channel 1. Connect these pins either to GND or INx to allow normal or fast charging of the NR/SSx capacitor. If a CNR/SSx capacitor is not used, SS_CTRLx must be connected to GND.

logical_pins.name: SS_CTRL2
logical_pins.description: Soft-start control pin for channel 2. Connect these pins either to GND or INx to allow normal or fast charging of the NR/SSx capacitor. If a CNR/SSx capacitor is not used, SS_CTRLx must be connected to GND.

logical_pins.name: Thermal pad
logical_pins.description: Connect the thermal pad to the printed circuit board (PCB) ground plane.

18.name: SS_CTRL1

8.name: SS_CTRL2
